title: Migrate ASP.NET Apps to Azure
summary: Migrate ASP.NET web applications and their data to Azure App Service and Azure SQL Database to take advantage of the cloud.

sections.title: Migrate ASP.NET Apps to Azure
sections.summary: Migrate ASP.NET web applications and their data to Azure App Service and Azure SQL Database to take advantage of the cloud.

lessons.title: Host a web application with Azure App Service
lessons.content_md:
Create a website using C#, Java, Python, or Node.js and deploy it through the hosted web app platform in Azure App Service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/host-a-web-app-with-azure-app-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Host a web application with Azure App Service

lessons.title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL Database
lessons.content_md:
Learn the essentials of Azure SQL Database deployment and migration. Explore its benefits, exclusive features, and migration options while optimizing performance and application connections for a smooth transition to the cloud.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-sql-workloads-azure-sql-databases/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate SQL Server workloads to Azure SQL Database

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Migrate ASP.NET Apps to Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Migrate ASP.NET Apps to Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
